title: Senior Tech Lead Mobile Developer Risora

summary.lv: SKELAR, Ukrainas venture builder, meklē Senior Tech Lead mobilo izstrādātāju projektam Risora — vadīt mobilās izstrādes komandu un lemt par tehnoloģiju arhitektūru.
summary.en: SKELAR, a Ukrainian venture builder, is looking for a Senior Tech Lead Mobile Developer for the Risora project to lead the mobile development team and make architectural technology decisions.
